subcodes.title: Words to some Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-20
subcodes.first_line: You must all arise in unison to serve the Cause of God. You must work hand in hand to teach the Cause and know that the confirmations of Baha'u'llah will descend upon you.
subcodes.first_line_orig: شماها باید باباتفاق بر خدمت امر الله برخیزید دست بدست یکدیگر دهید و مشغول تبلیغ امر الله باشید
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
